Capabilities

Streetwear Manufacturing Features

Every technique your streetwear brand needs — all under one roof.

🎨 Garment Dyeing

Vintage wash, acid wash, sun-faded, mineral wash. Any treatment.

✂️ Distressing

Raw hems, ripped details, deconstructed edges, frayed finishes.

🖨️ Screen Print

Water-based, discharge, puff, high-density. Up to 12 colors.

🧵 Embroidery

3D puff, flat, chain stitch, chenille patches. Any placement.

🏷️ Woven Labels

Neck labels, hem tags, sleeve flags. Damask or satin weave.

📦 Custom Packaging

Poly mailers, hang tags, stickers, tissue paper. Full brand kit.

⚖️ Heavyweight Fabric

Up to 400gsm. Premium cotton, French terry, fleece, jersey.

📐 Oversized Fits

Boxy, drop shoulder, extended length. Custom grading available.

Launch Your Streetwear Brand

Free sample with your design. Free mockup in 24 hours. NDA signed. Your designs are 100% protected.
